title: Josh's Optimisation Pack
description: A collection of mods that are designed to boost Minecraft's performance!
body:
Welcome to the Modrinth page for Josh's Performance Pack!

My modpack has a very simple focus, to get the most performance out of Minecraft. This is achieved through speeding up various aspects of the game, including but not limited to rendering, world loading and lighting. This modpack also aims to give you a more bug free experience, as it includes mods that fix a variety of bugs in Minecraft.

Currently, the modpack is designed around version 1.19.3 and I will update the modpack where and when necessary. Regular checks for mod updates will also be done.
